name: GoCardless
description: GoCardless is a global direct debit payment platform that lets you collect recurring and one-off payments directly from customer bank accounts. It supports SEPA Direct Debit, Bacs, ACH, BECS, and other local bank debit schemes across 30+ countries, with lower fees than card payments and reduced churn from failed payments.

capabilities.name: create_payment
capabilities.description: Create a direct debit payment to collect money from a customer's bank account using an existing mandate.

capabilities.name: create_mandate
capabilities.description: Create a direct debit mandate authorizing you to collect payments from a customer's bank account.

capabilities.name: create_customer
capabilities.description: Create a new customer record with their name, email, and address details.

capabilities.name: list_payments
capabilities.description: List and filter all direct debit payments across your GoCardless account.

capabilities.name: create_subscription
capabilities.description: Set up a recurring direct debit subscription that automatically creates payments at defined intervals.

capabilities.name: create_payout
capabilities.description: List payouts showing when collected funds are transferred to your bank account.
